name: glance
description: Drop a folder of static files, get a URL. Self-hostable static hosting on Cloudflare Workers.
author: Plivo Inc.

scripts.dev: trap 'kill 0' SIGINT; bun run dev:api & bun run dev:content & bun run dev:web & wait
scripts.dev:content: cd packages/api && bunx wrangler dev --config wrangler.content.jsonc --port 8788 --persist-to ../../.wrangler-shared
scripts.db:migrate:local: cd packages/api && bunx wrangler d1 migrations apply glance-db --local --persist-to ../../.wrangler-shared
scripts.db:migrate:remote: cd packages/api && bunx wrangler d1 migrations apply glance-db --remote
scripts.deploy: bun run build:web && cd packages/api && bunx wrangler deploy && bunx wrangler deploy --config wrangler.content.jsonc
